variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16676 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16676 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16676 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P616742 Air Filter, Primary Konepac | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16676
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P616742 Air Filter, Primary Konepac is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, primary konepac applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4264 Air, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16676
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4264 Magnum RS™ radial seal primary air element is designed to meet the rugged demands of equipment operating in the harshest environments.  The Magnum RS offers unique features that provide significant benefits for longer service life and optimum performance when the job demands it.
